title: Connect acts as a bridge between the Switchboard ecosystem and the decentralized Swarm network.
content:
## Claim
Connect becomes a bridge: drives pulled from Switchboard via GQL are simultaneously mirrored to Swarm storage, so users can migrate gradually.

## Evidence
From the source: "Connect becomes a bridge between the existing Switchboard ecosystem and the decentralized Swarm network. Any remote drive from Switchboard can be automatically mirrored to Swarm storage."

The bridge diagram shows Remote Drives (A, B) pulled via GQL and pushed out via Swarm, alongside Local Drives (C) that live only on Swarm.

## Consequences
- Users can disconnect from Switchboard after mirroring completes.
- Both remote and local drives become recoverable on any device via Swarm.
- No data is locked into a single infrastructure.

## Source
Swarm Channel Architecture, "The Bridge Pattern" diagram.
description: Any remote drive pulled from Switchboard can be automatically mirrored to Swarm storage, letting users cross over without abandoning existing data.
